creator: swschulz@astrum.net
text:
While installing, I chose to have the apache-mod_ssl and OpenSSH installed.  One or the other caused rsaref-2.0 to be installed as a dependency.  Upone reaching that point, the install stopped with the usual (waiting for pkg_add) line at the bottom.  Hitting Alt-F2 showed a small dialog box which said something to the effect of "are you ready to install...".  Yes was selected, but the screen would accept no input.  Alt-F4 was functional, showing the the machine was still running otherwise.

Fix: 

Skip them. (Sorry.. ;)
How-To-Repeat: Reselect those packages.
